parameters.query:
INSERT INTO gnote.user_state (user_id, state)
VALUES (
  {{ $json.callback_query?.from?.id || $json.message?.from?.id }},
  'waiting_for_topic_name'
)
ON CONFLICT (user_id)
DO UPDATE SET 
  state = 'waiting_for_topic_name',
  created_at = NOW();

parameters.text:
={{
  $json.is_reserved_name
    ? "This is a system name ⚠️

You cannot create a topic named Deleted messages.
Please choose another name."
    : "Topic created ✅
📁 " + $json.topic_title +
      "

Saved messages: " + $json.saved_count +
      "
Total messages: " + $json.user_all_messages
}}

parameters.query:
WITH input_data AS (
  SELECT
    '{{ $("Telegram Trigger").first().json.message.text.replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::TEXT AS topic_title,
    {{ $("Telegram Trigger").first().json.message.from.id }}::BIGINT AS user_id
),

reserved_name AS (
  SELECT
    CASE
      WHEN LOWER(TRIM(topic_title)) IN ('deleted_messages', 'deleted messages') THEN TRUE
      ELSE FALSE
    END AS is_reserved
  FROM input_data
),

inserted AS (
  INSERT INTO gnote.topics (title, user_id, removable)
  SELECT
    topic_title,
    user_id,
    TRUE
  FROM input_data
  WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM reserved_name WHERE is_reserved = TRUE)
  ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
  RETURNING id, title, user_id, removable
),

existing AS (
  SELECT t.id, t.title, t.user_id, t.removable
  FROM gnote.topics t
  JOIN input_data i
    ON i.user_id = t.user_id
   AND LOWER(t.title) = LOWER(i.topic_title)
  WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM reserved_name WHERE is_reserved = TRUE)
  LIMIT 1
),

clear_state AS (
  DELETE FROM gnote.user_state
  WHERE user_id = (SELECT user_id FROM input_data)
),

result_topic AS (
  SELECT * FROM inserted
  UNION ALL
  SELECT * FROM existing
  LIMIT 1
)

SELECT
  rt.id,
  rt.title,
  rt.user_id,
  rt.removable,
  (SELECT is_reserved FROM reserved_name) AS is_reserved_name
FROM result_topic rt

UNION ALL

SELECT
  NULL::BIGINT AS id,
  'Deleted messages'::TEXT AS title,
  (SELECT user_id FROM input_data)::BIGINT AS user_id,
  FALSE AS removable,
  TRUE AS is_reserved_name
WHERE (SELECT is_reserved FROM reserved_name) = TRUE;

WITH input_user AS (
  SELECT
    {{ $json.user_id }}::BIGINT AS user_id,
    '{{ $("Telegram Trigger").first().json.message.from.username || "" }}'::TEXT AS username,
    '{{ $("Telegram Trigger").first().json.message.from.first_name || "" }}'::TEXT AS first_name,
    '{{ $("Telegram Trigger").first().json.message.from.last_name || "" }}'::TEXT AS last_name
),

prepared_user AS (
  SELECT
    user_id,
    username,
    first_name,
    last_name,
    COALESCE(
      NULLIF(TRIM(first_name || ' ' || last_name), ''),
      NULLIF(username, ''),
      'Telegram User'
    ) AS display_name
  FROM input_user
),

upsert_user AS (
  INSERT INTO gnote.users (
    id,
    name,
    username,
    first_name,
    last_name,
    all_messages
  )
  SELECT
    user_id,
    display_name,
    username,
    first_name,
    last_name,
    0
  FROM prepared_user
  ON CONFLICT (id) DO UPDATE SET
    name = EXCLUDED.name,
    username = EXCLUDED.username,
    first_name = EXCLUDED.first_name,
    last_name = EXCLUDED.last_name
  RETURNING id
),

ensure_deleted_topic AS (
  INSERT INTO gnote.topics (
    user_id,
    title,
    created_at,
    removable
  )
  SELECT
    {{ $json.user_id }}::BIGINT,
    'deleted messages',
    NOW(),
    FALSE
  WHERE NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM gnote.topics
    WHERE user_id = {{ $json.user_id }}::BIGINT
      AND LOWER(title) = 'deleted messages'
  )
  RETURNING id
),

  
clear_old_pending AS (
  DELETE FROM gnote.pending_messages
  WHERE user_id = {{ $json.user_id }}
  RETURNING id
),

insert_pending AS (
  INSERT INTO gnote.pending_messages (
    user_id,
    message,
    created_at,
    message_type,
    file_id,
    file_unique_id,
    file_name,
    mime_type,
    caption,
    telegram_file_path,
    file_url,
    latitude,
    longitude,
    location_title,
    location_address,
    maps_url
  )
  VALUES (
    {{ $json.user_id }},
    '{{ String($json.message || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
    NOW(),
    '{{ $json.message_type || "text" }}',
    {{ $json.file_id ? "'" + String($json.file_id).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL" }},
    {{ $json.file_unique_id ? "'" + String($json.file_unique_id).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL" }},
    {{ $json.file_name ? "'" + String($json.file_name).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL" }},
    {{ $json.mime_type ? "'" + String($json.mime_type).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL" }},
    {{ $json.caption ? "'" + String($json.caption).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL" }},
    {{ $json.telegram_file_path ? "'" + String($json.telegram_file_path).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL" }},
    {{ $json.file_url ? "'" + String($json.file_url).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL" }},
    {{ $json.latitude !== null && $json.latitude !== undefined ? Number($json.latitude) : "NULL" }},
    {{ $json.longitude !== null && $json.longitude !== undefined ? Number($json.longitude) : "NULL" }},
    {{ $json.location_title ? "'" + String($json.location_title).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL" }},
    {{ $json.location_address ? "'" + String($json.location_address).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL" }},
    {{ $json.maps_url ? "'" + String($json.maps_url).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL" }}
  )
  RETURNING *
)

SELECT
  insert_pending.id AS pending_message_id,
  insert_pending.message_uuid,
  insert_pending.user_id,
  {{ $json.chat_id }}::BIGINT AS chat_id,
  insert_pending.message,
  insert_pending.message_type,
  insert_pending.file_id,
  insert_pending.file_unique_id,
  insert_pending.file_name,
  insert_pending.mime_type,
  insert_pending.caption,
  insert_pending.telegram_file_path,
  insert_pending.file_url,
  insert_pending.latitude,
  insert_pending.longitude,
  insert_pending.location_title,
  insert_pending.location_address,
  insert_pending.maps_url
FROM insert_pending;

WITH selected_topic AS (
  SELECT id, title, user_id
  FROM gnote.topics
  WHERE id = {{ $json.topic_id }}
    AND user_id = {{ $json.user_id }}
  LIMIT 1
),

moved AS (
  DELETE FROM gnote.pending_messages
  WHERE user_id = {{ $json.user_id }}
    AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM selected_topic)
  RETURNING
    id AS pending_id,
    message_uuid,
    user_id,
    message,
    created_at,
    message_type,
    file_id,
    file_unique_id,
    file_name,
    mime_type,
    caption,
    telegram_file_path,
    file_url,
    latitude,
    longitude,
    location_title,
    location_address,
    maps_url
),

inserted AS (
  INSERT INTO gnote.messages (
    user_id,
    topic_id,
    message_uuid,
    content,
    created_at,
    message_type,
    file_id,
    file_unique_id,
    file_name,
    mime_type,
    caption,
    telegram_file_path,
    file_url,
    latitude,
    longitude,
    location_title,
    location_address,
    maps_url
  )
  SELECT
    moved.user_id,
    {{ $json.topic_id }},
    moved.message_uuid,
    moved.message,
    moved.created_at,
    COALESCE(moved.message_type, 'text'),
    moved.file_id,
    moved.file_unique_id,
    moved.file_name,
    moved.mime_type,
    moved.caption,
    moved.telegram_file_path,
    moved.file_url,
    moved.latitude,
    moved.longitude,
    moved.location_title,
    moved.location_address,
    moved.maps_url
  FROM moved
  RETURNING id, user_id, message_uuid
),

attach_ai_metadata AS (
  UPDATE gnote.message_ai_metadata meta
  SET
    message_id = inserted.id,
    source_status = 'attached',
    updated_at = NOW()
  FROM inserted
  WHERE meta.message_uuid = inserted.message_uuid
    AND meta.user_id = inserted.user_id
    AND meta.message_id IS NULL
  RETURNING meta.id
),

attach_ai_index AS (
  UPDATE gnote.message_ai_index idx
  SET
    message_id = inserted.id,
    source_status = 'attached',
    updated_at = NOW()
  FROM inserted
  WHERE idx.message_uuid = inserted.message_uuid
    AND idx.user_id = inserted.user_id
    AND idx.message_id IS NULL
  RETURNING idx.id
),

stats AS (
  SELECT COUNT(*) AS saved_count
  FROM inserted
),

real_user_counter AS (
  SELECT COUNT(*) AS user_all_messages
  FROM gnote.messages
  WHERE user_id = {{ $json.user_id }}
)

SELECT
  stats.saved_count,
  {{ $json.user_id }}::BIGINT AS user_id,
  {{ $json.topic_id }}::BIGINT AS topic_id,
  {{ $json.chat_id }}::BIGINT AS chat_id,
  COALESCE((SELECT title FROM selected_topic), '') AS topic_title,
  COALESCE((SELECT user_all_messages FROM real_user_counter), 0) AS user_all_messages,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM attach_ai_metadata) AS attached_metadata_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM attach_ai_index) AS attached_index_count
FROM stats;

WITH selected_topic AS (
  SELECT
    {{ $json.id }}::BIGINT AS id,
    '{{ String($json.title || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::TEXT AS title,
    {{ $json.user_id }}::BIGINT AS user_id
  WHERE NOT {{ $json.is_reserved_name ? 'TRUE' : 'FALSE' }}
),

moved AS (
  DELETE FROM gnote.pending_messages
  WHERE user_id = {{ $json.user_id }}
    AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM selected_topic)
  RETURNING
    id AS pending_id,
    message_uuid,
    user_id,
    message,
    created_at,
    message_type,
    file_id,
    file_unique_id,
    file_name,
    mime_type,
    caption,
    telegram_file_path,
    file_url,
    latitude,
    longitude,
    location_title,
    location_address,
    maps_url
),

inserted AS (
  INSERT INTO gnote.messages (
    user_id,
    topic_id,
    message_uuid,
    content,
    created_at,
    message_type,
    file_id,
    file_unique_id,
    file_name,
    mime_type,
    caption,
    telegram_file_path,
    file_url,
    latitude,
    longitude,
    location_title,
    location_address,
    maps_url
  )
  SELECT
    moved.user_id,
    (SELECT id FROM selected_topic),
    moved.message_uuid,
    moved.message,
    moved.created_at,
    COALESCE(moved.message_type, 'text'),
    moved.file_id,
    moved.file_unique_id,
    moved.file_name,
    moved.mime_type,
    moved.caption,
    moved.telegram_file_path,
    moved.file_url,
    moved.latitude,
    moved.longitude,
    moved.location_title,
    moved.location_address,
    moved.maps_url
  FROM moved
  WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM selected_topic)
  RETURNING id, user_id, message_uuid
),

attach_ai_metadata AS (
  UPDATE gnote.message_ai_metadata meta
  SET
    message_id = inserted.id,
    source_status = 'attached',
    updated_at = NOW()
  FROM inserted
  WHERE meta.message_uuid = inserted.message_uuid
    AND meta.user_id = inserted.user_id
    AND meta.message_id IS NULL
  RETURNING meta.id
),

attach_ai_index AS (
  UPDATE gnote.message_ai_index idx
  SET
    message_id = inserted.id,
    source_status = 'attached',
    updated_at = NOW()
  FROM inserted
  WHERE idx.message_uuid = inserted.message_uuid
    AND idx.user_id = inserted.user_id
    AND idx.message_id IS NULL
  RETURNING idx.id
),

stats AS (
  SELECT COUNT(*) AS saved_count
  FROM inserted
),

real_user_counter AS (
  SELECT COUNT(*) AS user_all_messages
  FROM gnote.messages
  WHERE user_id = {{ $json.user_id }}
)

SELECT
  stats.saved_count,
  {{ $json.user_id }}::BIGINT AS user_id,
  COALESCE((SELECT id FROM selected_topic), {{ $json.id }}::BIGINT) AS topic_id,
  {{ $('Telegram Trigger').first().json.message.chat.id }}::BIGINT AS chat_id,
  COALESCE((SELECT title FROM selected_topic), '{{ String($json.title || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}') AS topic_title,
  COALESCE((SELECT user_all_messages FROM real_user_counter), 0) AS user_all_messages,
  {{ $json.is_reserved_name ? 'TRUE' : 'FALSE' }} AS is_reserved_name,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM attach_ai_metadata) AS attached_metadata_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM attach_ai_index) AS attached_index_count
FROM stats;

parameters.content:
Main Event Router

This block receives all incoming Telegram updates and routes them by event type.
- `message` — regular user text message
- `callback_query` — inline keyboard button click

parameters.query:
SELECT
  t.id,
  t.title,
  COUNT(m.id) AS messages_count
FROM gnote.topics t
LEFT JOIN gnote.messages m
  ON m.topic_id = t.id
  AND m.user_id = t.user_id
  AND (
    m.deleted_at IS NULL
    OR LOWER(t.title) = 'deleted messages'
  )
WHERE t.user_id = {{ $json.message?.from?.id || $json.callback_query?.from?.id }}
GROUP BY t.id, t.title
ORDER BY
  CASE WHEN LOWER(t.title) = 'deleted messages' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END,
  t.title ASC;

SELECT
  t.id,
  t.title,
  COUNT(m.id) AS messages_count
FROM gnote.topics t
LEFT JOIN gnote.messages m
  ON m.topic_id = t.id
  AND m.user_id = t.user_id
  AND (
    m.deleted_at IS NULL
    OR LOWER(t.title) = 'deleted messages'
  )
WHERE t.user_id = {{ $json.message?.from?.id || $json.callback_query?.from?.id }}
GROUP BY t.id, t.title
ORDER BY
  CASE WHEN LOWER(t.title) = 'deleted messages' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END,
  t.title ASC;

SELECT
  m.id,
  m.user_id,
  m.topic_id,
  m.content,
  m.created_at,

  m.message_type,

  m.file_id,
  m.file_unique_id,
  m.file_name,
  m.mime_type,
  m.caption,
  m.telegram_file_path,
  m.file_url,

  m.latitude,
  m.longitude,
  m.location_title,
  m.location_address,
  m.maps_url,

  t.title AS topic_title

FROM gnote.messages m
JOIN gnote.topics t
  ON t.id = m.topic_id
 AND t.user_id = m.user_id

WHERE m.user_id = {{ $json.user_id }}
  AND m.topic_id = {{ $json.topic_id }}

ORDER BY m.created_at DESC;

SELECT
  m.id,
  m.user_id,
  m.topic_id,
  m.content,
  m.created_at,
  m.message_type,
  m.file_id,
  m.file_unique_id,
  m.file_name,
  m.mime_type,
  m.caption,
  t.title AS topic_title,
  {{ $json.chat_id }}::BIGINT AS chat_id,
  '{{ $json.callback_query_id }}' AS callback_query_id
FROM gnote.messages m
JOIN gnote.topics t
  ON t.id = m.topic_id
 AND t.user_id = m.user_id
WHERE m.id = {{ $json.message_id }}
  AND m.user_id = {{ $json.user_id }}
  AND m.file_id IS NOT NULL
LIMIT 1;

SELECT
  t.id,
  t.title,
  COUNT(m.id) AS messages_count
FROM gnote.topics t
LEFT JOIN gnote.messages m
  ON m.topic_id = t.id
  AND m.user_id = t.user_id
  AND m.deleted_at IS NULL
WHERE t.user_id = {{ $json.message.from.id }}
  AND t.removable = TRUE
  AND LOWER(t.title) <> 'deleted_messages'
GROUP BY t.id, t.title
ORDER BY t.title ASC;

SELECT
  t.id,
  t.title,
  t.removable,
  COUNT(m.id) AS messages_count,
  {{ $json.user_id }}::BIGINT AS user_id,
  {{ $json.chat_id }}::BIGINT AS chat_id
FROM gnote.topics t
LEFT JOIN gnote.messages m
  ON m.topic_id = t.id
  AND m.user_id = t.user_id
  AND m.deleted_at IS NULL
WHERE t.id = {{ $json.topic_id }}
  AND t.user_id = {{ $json.user_id }}
  AND t.removable = TRUE
  AND LOWER(t.title) <> 'deleted_messages'
GROUP BY t.id, t.title, t.removable;

WITH selected_topic AS (
  SELECT id, title, user_id
  FROM gnote.topics
  WHERE id = {{ $json.topic_id }}
    AND user_id = {{ $json.user_id }}
    AND removable = TRUE
    AND LOWER(title) <> 'deleted messages'
  LIMIT 1
),

ensure_deleted_topic AS (
  INSERT INTO gnote.topics (title, user_id, removable)
  SELECT
    'Deleted messages',
    {{ $json.user_id }},
    FALSE
  WHERE NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM gnote.topics
    WHERE user_id = {{ $json.user_id }}
      AND LOWER(title) = 'deleted messages'
  )
  RETURNING id
),

protect_deleted_topic AS (
  UPDATE gnote.topics
  SET removable = FALSE
  WHERE user_id = {{ $json.user_id }}
    AND LOWER(title) = 'deleted messages'
  RETURNING id
),

target_deleted_topic AS (
  SELECT id
  FROM gnote.topics
  WHERE user_id = {{ $json.user_id }}
    AND LOWER(title) = 'deleted messages'
  LIMIT 1
),

moved AS (
  UPDATE gnote.messages m
  SET
    topic_id = (SELECT id FROM target_deleted_topic),
    deleted_at = NOW()
  WHERE m.topic_id = {{ $json.topic_id }}
    AND m.user_id = {{ $json.user_id }}
    AND m.deleted_at IS NULL
    AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM selected_topic)
  RETURNING m.id
),

deleted_original_topic AS (
  DELETE FROM gnote.topics t
  WHERE t.id = {{ $json.topic_id }}
    AND t.user_id = {{ $json.user_id }}
    AND t.removable = TRUE
    AND LOWER(t.title) <> 'deleted messages'
    AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM selected_topic)
  RETURNING t.id, t.title
),

stats AS (
  SELECT COUNT(*) AS moved_count
  FROM moved
)

SELECT
  {{ $json.chat_id }}::BIGINT AS chat_id,
  COALESCE((SELECT title FROM selected_topic), '') AS topic_title,
  (SELECT moved_count FROM stats) AS moved_count,
  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM deleted_original_topic) AS topic_deleted;

WITH selected_topic AS (
  SELECT id, title, user_id
  FROM gnote.topics
  WHERE id = {{ $json.topic_id }}
    AND user_id = {{ $json.user_id }}
    AND removable = TRUE
    AND LOWER(title) <> 'deleted_messages'
  LIMIT 1
),

messages_list AS (
  SELECT
    m.id,
    m.content,
    m.created_at,
    m.message_type,
    m.file_id,
    m.file_unique_id,
    m.file_name,
    m.mime_type,
    m.caption,
    m.telegram_file_path,
    m.file_url,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY m.created_at DESC, m.id DESC) AS message_number,
    COUNT(*) OVER () AS total_count
  FROM gnote.messages m
  JOIN selected_topic st
    ON st.id = m.topic_id
   AND st.user_id = m.user_id
  WHERE m.deleted_at IS NULL
  ORDER BY m.created_at DESC, m.id DESC
),

result_messages AS (
  SELECT
    ml.*,
    st.title AS topic_title,
    st.id AS topic_id
  FROM messages_list ml
  CROSS JOIN selected_topic st
),

empty_result AS (
  SELECT
    NULL::BIGINT AS id,
    NULL::TEXT AS content,
    NULL::TIMESTAMP AS created_at,
    'empty'::TEXT AS message_type,
    NULL::TEXT AS file_id,
    NULL::TEXT AS file_unique_id,
    NULL::TEXT AS file_name,
    NULL::TEXT AS mime_type,
    NULL::TEXT AS caption,
    NULL::TEXT AS telegram_file_path,
    NULL::TEXT AS file_url,
    0::BIGINT AS message_number,
    0::BIGINT AS total_count,
    st.title AS topic_title,
    st.id AS topic_id
  FROM selected_topic st
  WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM messages_list)
)

SELECT
  *,
  {{ $json.user_id }}::BIGINT AS user_id,
  {{ $json.chat_id }}::BIGINT AS chat_id
FROM result_messages

UNION ALL

SELECT
  *,
  {{ $json.user_id }}::BIGINT AS user_id,
  {{ $json.chat_id }}::BIGINT AS chat_id
FROM empty_result;

WITH selected_message AS (
  SELECT m.*
  FROM gnote.messages m
  JOIN gnote.topics t
    ON t.id = m.topic_id
   AND t.user_id = m.user_id
  WHERE m.id = {{ $json.message_id }}
    AND m.user_id = {{ $json.user_id }}
    AND m.deleted_at IS NULL
    AND t.removable = TRUE
    AND LOWER(t.title) <> 'deleted messages'
  LIMIT 1
),

ensure_deleted_topic AS (
  INSERT INTO gnote.topics (title, user_id, removable)
  SELECT
    'Deleted messages',
    {{ $json.user_id }},
    FALSE
  WHERE NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM gnote.topics
    WHERE user_id = {{ $json.user_id }}
      AND LOWER(title) = 'deleted messages'
  )
  RETURNING id
),

protect_deleted_topic AS (
  UPDATE gnote.topics
  SET removable = FALSE
  WHERE user_id = {{ $json.user_id }}
    AND LOWER(title) = 'deleted messages'
  RETURNING id
),

target_deleted_topic AS (
  SELECT id
  FROM gnote.topics
  WHERE user_id = {{ $json.user_id }}
    AND LOWER(title) = 'deleted messages'
  LIMIT 1
),

moved AS (
  UPDATE gnote.messages m
  SET
    topic_id = (SELECT id FROM target_deleted_topic),
    deleted_at = NOW()
  WHERE m.id = {{ $json.message_id }}
    AND m.user_id = {{ $json.user_id }}
    AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM selected_message)
    AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM target_deleted_topic)
  RETURNING m.id
),

stats AS (
  SELECT COUNT(*) AS moved_count
  FROM moved
),

deleted_count AS (
  SELECT COUNT(*) AS deleted_messages_count
  FROM gnote.messages
  WHERE user_id = {{ $json.user_id }}
    AND topic_id = (SELECT id FROM target_deleted_topic)
),

real_user_counter AS (
  SELECT COUNT(*) AS user_all_messages
  FROM gnote.messages
  WHERE user_id = {{ $json.user_id }}
)

SELECT
  {{ $json.chat_id }}::BIGINT AS chat_id,
  {{ $json.user_id }}::BIGINT AS user_id,
  {{ $json.message_id }}::BIGINT AS message_id,
  COALESCE((SELECT moved_count FROM stats), 0) AS moved_count,
  COALESCE((SELECT deleted_messages_count FROM deleted_count), 0) AS deleted_messages_count,
  COALESCE((SELECT user_all_messages FROM real_user_counter), 0) AS user_all_messages;

WITH input_data AS (
  SELECT
    '{{ $json.topic_title.replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::TEXT AS topic_title,
    {{ $json.user_id }}::BIGINT AS user_id,
    {{ $json.chat_id }}::BIGINT AS chat_id
),

inserted AS (
  INSERT INTO gnote.topics (title, user_id, removable)
  SELECT
    topic_title,
    user_id,
    TRUE
  FROM input_data
  WHERE LOWER(TRIM(topic_title)) NOT IN ('deleted messages', 'deleted_messages')
  ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
  RETURNING id, title, user_id
),

existing AS (
  SELECT t.id, t.title, t.user_id
  FROM gnote.topics t
  JOIN input_data i
    ON i.user_id = t.user_id
   AND LOWER(t.title) = LOWER(i.topic_title)
  WHERE LOWER(TRIM(i.topic_title)) NOT IN ('deleted messages', 'deleted_messages')
  LIMIT 1
),

result_topic AS (
  SELECT * FROM inserted
  UNION ALL
  SELECT * FROM existing
  LIMIT 1
)

SELECT
  rt.id AS topic_id,
  rt.title AS topic_title,
  rt.user_id,
  (SELECT chat_id FROM input_data) AS chat_id
FROM result_topic rt;

WITH selected_topic AS (
  SELECT id, title, user_id
  FROM gnote.topics
  WHERE id = {{ $json.topic_id }}
    AND user_id = {{ $json.user_id }}
  LIMIT 1
),

moved AS (
  DELETE FROM gnote.pending_messages
  WHERE user_id = {{ $json.user_id }}
    AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM selected_topic)
  RETURNING
    id AS pending_id,
    user_id,
    message,
    created_at,
    message_type,
    file_id,
    file_unique_id,
    file_name,
    mime_type,
    caption,
    telegram_file_path,
    file_url,
    latitude,
    longitude,
    location_title,
    location_address,
    maps_url
),

inserted AS (
  INSERT INTO gnote.messages (
    user_id,
    topic_id,
    content,
    created_at,
    message_type,
    file_id,
    file_unique_id,
    file_name,
    mime_type,
    caption,
    telegram_file_path,
    file_url,
    latitude,
    longitude,
    location_title,
    location_address,
    maps_url
  )
  SELECT
    moved.user_id,
    {{ $json.topic_id }},
    moved.message,
    moved.created_at,
    COALESCE(moved.message_type, 'text'),
    moved.file_id,
    moved.file_unique_id,
    moved.file_name,
    moved.mime_type,
    moved.caption,
    moved.telegram_file_path,
    moved.file_url,
    moved.latitude,
    moved.longitude,
    moved.location_title,
    moved.location_address,
    moved.maps_url
  FROM moved
  RETURNING id
),

stats AS (
  SELECT COUNT(*) AS saved_count
  FROM inserted
),

real_user_counter AS (
  SELECT COUNT(*) AS user_all_messages
  FROM gnote.messages
  WHERE user_id = {{ $json.user_id }}
)

SELECT
  stats.saved_count,
  {{ $json.user_id }}::BIGINT AS user_id,
  {{ $json.topic_id }}::BIGINT AS topic_id,
  {{ $json.chat_id }}::BIGINT AS chat_id,
  COALESCE((SELECT title FROM selected_topic), '') AS topic_title,
  COALESCE((SELECT user_all_messages FROM real_user_counter), 0) AS user_all_messages
FROM stats;

WITH deleted AS (
  DELETE FROM gnote.pending_messages
  WHERE user_id = {{ $json.user_id }}
  RETURNING id
)

SELECT
  {{ $json.user_id }}::BIGINT AS user_id,
  {{ $json.chat_id }}::BIGINT AS chat_id,
  {{ $json.callback_query_id ? "'" + $json.callback_query_id + "'" : "NULL" }}::TEXT AS callback_query_id,
  {{ $json.telegram_message_id }}::BIGINT AS telegram_message_id,
  COUNT(*) AS deleted_count
FROM deleted;

WITH input_data AS (
  SELECT
    {{ $json.user_id }}::BIGINT AS user_id,
    {{ $json.chat_id }}::BIGINT AS chat_id,

    {{ $json.pending_message_id || 'NULL' }}::BIGINT AS pending_message_id,
    {{ $json.message_uuid ? "'" + String($json.message_uuid).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'::UUID" : "NULL::UUID" }} AS message_uuid,

    '{{ String($json.message_type || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::TEXT AS message_type,

    {{ $json.message ? "'" + String($json.message).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL" }}::TEXT AS message,
    {{ $json.content ? "'" + String($json.content).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL" }}::TEXT AS content,

    {{ $json.file_name ? "'" + String($json.file_name).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL" }}::TEXT AS file_name,
    {{ $json.mime_type ? "'" + String($json.mime_type).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL" }}::TEXT AS mime_type,
    {{ $json.caption ? "'" + String($json.caption).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL" }}::TEXT AS caption,

    {{ $json.file_analysis_status ? "'" + String($json.file_analysis_status).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL" }}::TEXT AS file_analysis_status,
    {{ $json.file_analysis_text ? "'" + String($json.file_analysis_text).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL" }}::TEXT AS file_analysis_text,

    {{ $json.file_analysis_summary ? "'" + String($json.file_analysis_summary).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : ($json.file_analysis_json?.summary ? "'" + String($json.file_analysis_json.summary).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL") }}::TEXT AS summary,

    {{ $json.file_analysis_detected_type ? "'" + String($json.file_analysis_detected_type).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : ($json.file_analysis_json?.detected_type ? "'" + String($json.file_analysis_json.detected_type).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL") }}::TEXT AS detected_type,

    {{ $json.file_analysis_json?.language ? "'" + String($json.file_analysis_json.language).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL" }}::TEXT AS language,

    '{{ JSON.stringify($json.file_analysis_json || {}).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::JSONB AS file_analysis_json,

    {{ $json.location_title ? "'" + String($json.location_title).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL" }}::TEXT AS location_title,
    {{ $json.location_address ? "'" + String($json.location_address).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL" }}::TEXT AS location_address,
    {{ $json.maps_url ? "'" + String($json.maps_url).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL" }}::TEXT AS maps_url
),

prepared AS (
  SELECT
    *,

    COALESCE(
      NULLIF(summary, ''),
      NULLIF(content, ''),
      NULLIF(message, ''),
      NULLIF(caption, ''),
      NULLIF(file_name, ''),
      'EMPTY'
    ) AS final_summary,

    COALESCE(
      NULLIF(detected_type, ''),
      CASE
        WHEN message_type = 'text' THEN 'note'
        WHEN message_type = 'photo' THEN 'photo'
        WHEN message_type = 'document' THEN 'document'
        WHEN message_type = 'location' THEN 'location'
        WHEN message_type = 'voice' THEN 'voice'
        WHEN message_type = 'video' THEN 'video'
        WHEN message_type = 'video_note' THEN 'video_note'
        ELSE 'unknown'
      END
    ) AS final_category,

    COALESCE(NULLIF(language, ''), 'unknown') AS final_language,

    CASE
      WHEN jsonb_typeof(file_analysis_json->'keywords') = 'array'
      THEN file_analysis_json->'keywords'
      ELSE '[]'::JSONB
    END AS keywords_json,

    CASE
      WHEN jsonb_typeof(file_analysis_json->'important_details') = 'array'
      THEN file_analysis_json->'important_details'
      ELSE '[]'::JSONB
    END AS important_details_json,

    CASE
      WHEN jsonb_typeof(file_analysis_json->'suggested_topics') = 'array'
      THEN file_analysis_json->'suggested_topics'
      ELSE '[]'::JSONB
    END AS suggested_topics_json,

    jsonb_build_object(
      'important_details',
        CASE
          WHEN jsonb_typeof(file_analysis_json->'important_details') = 'array'
          THEN file_analysis_json->'important_details'
          ELSE '[]'::JSONB
        END,
      'suggested_topics',
        CASE
          WHEN jsonb_typeof(file_analysis_json->'suggested_topics') = 'array'
          THEN file_analysis_json->'suggested_topics'
          ELSE '[]'::JSONB
        END,
      'visible_or_extracted_text', COALESCE(file_analysis_json->>'visible_or_extracted_text', ''),
      'dates', '[]'::JSONB,
      'people', '[]'::JSONB,
      'places', '[]'::JSONB,
      'amounts', '[]'::JSONB
    ) AS final_entities,

    CASE
      WHEN COALESCE(file_analysis_json->>'confidence', '') ~ '^[0-9]+(\.[0-9]+)?$'
      THEN (file_analysis_json->>'confidence')::NUMERIC
      ELSE 0
    END AS final_confidence,

    TRIM(CONCAT_WS(E'\n',
      'Message type: ' || message_type,
      'File name: ' || COALESCE(file_name, ''),
      'MIME type: ' || COALESCE(mime_type, ''),
      'Caption: ' || COALESCE(caption, ''),
      'Summary: ' || COALESCE(summary, ''),
      'Detected type: ' || COALESCE(detected_type, ''),
      'AI analysis: ' || COALESCE(file_analysis_text, ''),
      'Extracted text: ' || COALESCE(file_analysis_json->>'visible_or_extracted_text', ''),
      'Message: ' || COALESCE(message, ''),
      'Content: ' || COALESCE(content, ''),
      'Location title: ' || COALESCE(location_title, ''),
      'Location address: ' || COALESCE(location_address, ''),
      'Map URL: ' || COALESCE(maps_url, '')
    )) AS final_ai_content

  FROM input_data
),

metadata_upsert AS (
  INSERT INTO gnote.message_ai_metadata (
    pending_message_id,
    message_uuid,
    user_id,
    source_status,

    summary,
    detected_type,
    category,
    language,

    keywords,
    suggested_topics,
    entities,
    important_details,

    confidence,
    raw_ai_json,
    ai_content,

    model_name,
    analysis_status,
    created_at,
    updated_at
  )
  SELECT
    pending_message_id,
    message_uuid,
    user_id,
    'pending',

    final_summary,
    detected_type,
    final_category,
    final_language,

    keywords_json,
    suggested_topics_json,
    final_entities,
    important_details_json,

    final_confidence,
    file_analysis_json,
    final_ai_content,

    'gemini',
    COALESCE(file_analysis_status, 'not_needed'),
    NOW(),
    NOW()
  FROM prepared
  WHERE pending_message_id IS NOT NULL
    AND file_analysis_status = 'done'

  ON CONFLICT (pending_message_id)
  WHERE pending_message_id IS NOT NULL
  DO UPDATE SET
    message_uuid = EXCLUDED.message_uuid,
    user_id = EXCLUDED.user_id,
    source_status = 'pending',

    summary = EXCLUDED.summary,
    detected_type = EXCLUDED.detected_type,
    category = EXCLUDED.category,
    language = EXCLUDED.language,

    keywords = EXCLUDED.keywords,
    suggested_topics = EXCLUDED.suggested_topics,
    entities = EXCLUDED.entities,
    important_details = EXCLUDED.important_details,

    confidence = EXCLUDED.confidence,
    raw_ai_json = EXCLUDED.raw_ai_json,
    ai_content = EXCLUDED.ai_content,

    model_name = EXCLUDED.model_name,
    analysis_status = EXCLUDED.analysis_status,
    updated_at = NOW()
  RETURNING id
),

index_upsert AS (
  INSERT INTO gnote.message_ai_index (
    message_uuid,
    user_id,
    summary,
    keywords,
    ai_content,
    category,
    language,
    entities,
    model_name,
    processed_at,
    pending_message_id,
    message_id,
    source_status,
    updated_at
  )
  SELECT
    message_uuid,
    user_id,
    final_summary,

    ARRAY(
      SELECT jsonb_array_elements_text(keywords_json)
    ),

    final_ai_content,
    final_category,
    final_language,
    final_entities,
    'gemini',
    NOW(),
    pending_message_id,
    NULL,
    'pending',
    NOW()
  FROM prepared
  WHERE pending_message_id IS NOT NULL
    AND file_analysis_status = 'done'

  ON CONFLICT (pending_message_id)
  WHERE pending_message_id IS NOT NULL
  DO UPDATE SET
    message_uuid = EXCLUDED.message_uuid,
    user_id = EXCLUDED.user_id,
    summary = EXCLUDED.summary,
    keywords = EXCLUDED.keywords,
    ai_content = EXCLUDED.ai_content,
    category = EXCLUDED.category,
    language = EXCLUDED.language,
    entities = EXCLUDED.entities,
    model_name = EXCLUDED.model_name,
    processed_at = NOW(),
    source_status = 'pending',
    updated_at = NOW()
  RETURNING id
)

SELECT
  prepared.user_id,
  prepared.chat_id,
  prepared.pending_message_id,
  prepared.message_uuid,
  prepared.message_type,

  prepared.message,
  prepared.content,
  prepared.file_name,
  prepared.mime_type,
  prepared.caption,

  prepared.file_analysis_status,
  prepared.file_analysis_text,
  prepared.file_analysis_json,

  prepared.final_summary AS file_analysis_summary,
  prepared.detected_type AS file_analysis_detected_type,

  prepared.location_title,
  prepared.location_address,
  prepared.maps_url,

  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM metadata_upsert) AS metadata_rows,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM index_upsert) AS index_rows

FROM prepared;

UPDATE gnote.user_state
SET
  state = 'idle',
  search_query = NULL,
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE user_id = {{ 
  (
    $('Prepare search query payload').first().json.user_id
    || $('switch messages').first().json.message?.from?.id
    || $('switch messages').first().json.callback_query?.from?.id
    || $('Telegram Trigger').first().json.message?.from?.id
    || $('Telegram Trigger').first().json.callback_query?.from?.id
  )
}}::BIGINT
RETURNING user_id, state;

INSERT INTO gnote.user_state (
  user_id,
  state,
  search_query,
  updated_at
)
VALUES (
  {{ $json.message.from.id }}::BIGINT,
  'waiting_search_query',
  NULL,
  NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT (user_id)
DO UPDATE SET
  state = 'waiting_search_query',
  search_query = NULL,
  updated_at = NOW()
RETURNING
  user_id,
  state,
  {{ $json.message.chat.id }}::BIGINT AS chat_id;
